name: HCM IV Acquisition Corp.
business: HCM IV Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of December 31, 2025, it had not commenced any operations and had generated no revenues. The company has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions with any target.
